entities.name: INDIAN SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: Semi-arid regions in India characterized by low water and crop productivity

entities.name: VERTISOLS
entities.description: Clay-rich soils found in semi-arid tropics associated with poor land management

entities.name: BROAD BED FURROWS
entities.description: A land water management practice designed to improve soil water content and crop productivity

entities.name: FLATBED PLANTING
entities.description: A conventional planting method used as a baseline for comparing water management

entities.name: SOIL WATER CONTENT
entities.description: The amount of water held in the soil profile

entities.name: WATER PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of crop yield produced per unit of water used

entities.name: CROP PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of crop yield produced per unit area

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A cereal crop used in sequential cropping with chickpea

entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: A legume crop used in sequential cropping with sorghum

entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: A cereal crop used in sequential cropping with groundnut

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A legume crop used in sequential cropping with maize

entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A cereal crop used in intercropping with pigeonpea

entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: A legume crop used in intercropping with pearl millet

entities.name: NUTRIENTS MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The application of macronutrients and micronutrients to improve crop growth

entities.name: MACRONUTRIENTS
entities.description: Essential plant nutrients including Nitrogen, Phosphorus, and Potassium

entities.name: MICRONUTRIENTS
entities.description: Essential plant nutrients required in small quantities

entities.name: SYSTEM EQUIVALENT YIELD
entities.description: A metric used to evaluate the total productivity of a cropping system

entities.name: WATER STRESS
entities.description: A state where water availability is insufficient for critical crop growth stages

entities.name: ERRATIC RAINFALL
entities.description: Unpredictable and low rainfall patterns

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Long-term shifts in temperatures and weather patterns causing erratic rainfall

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the research was conducted
